title: Ways to Describe Emotions - GUILT
description: Comprehensive guide to understanding guilt emotions, their triggers, manifestations, and effects

promptingEvents.description: Events that trigger feelings of guilt
events: Doing or thinking something you believe is wrong
Doing or thinking something that violates your personal values
Not doing something you said that you would do
Committing a transgression against another person or something you value
Causing harm or damage to another person or object
Causing harm or damage to yourself
Being reminded of something wrong you did in the past

interpretations.description: Interpretations of events that prompt feelings of guilt
interpretations: Thinking that your actions are to blame for something
Thinking, 'If only I had done something differently...'

biologicalChanges.description: Biological changes and experiences of guilt

behaviors: Trying to repair the harm, make amends for the wrongdoing, fix the damage, change the outcome
Giving gifts or making sacrifices to try to make up for the transgression
Bowing your head; kneeling before the person
